name: python3-jsmin
title: python3-jsmin
description:
JavaScript minifier written in Python
Python-jsmin is a JavaScript minifier library for Python 3.x.
It supports minification of JavaScript code following up to ECMAScript 5.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jsmin because JavaScript minifier written in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jsmin as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jsmin with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jsmin --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
